name: 基本导数
subject: math
curriculum_points: Differentiate functions of the form f(x) = ax^n, sin x, cos x, e^x, and ln x, and apply rules for sums and constant multiples (AO1).
Use differentiation to find equations of tangents and normals, and to identify intervals where a function is increasing or decreasing.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「基本导数」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Differentiate functions of the form f(x) = ax^n, sin x, cos x, e^x, and ln x, and apply rules for sums and constant mult…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Use differentiation to find equations of tangents and normals, and to identify i… 对理解「基本导数」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
